summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all requirements with strong TDD approach. Unit tests thoroughly exercise core functions (semver validation, version bumping, changelog generation, commit parsing) with fixture support. Integration tests via act validate the full workflow with multiple test cases (patch/minor/major). Strengths: complete feature coverage, proper test isolation using $TestDrive, well-organized Describe/It blocks, defensive fixture skipping, reliable cleanup. Weaknesses: missing edge cases like malformed JSON handling, file permission errors, large version numbers; workflow tests use fragile regex output parsing; minor redundancy (Cases and FixtureDir defined twice). Would catch most regressions but leave some error paths untested.
